name: Why is Siri taking so long to respond lately?
description: Slow Siri is often caused by network issues, outdated software, or device load. Restarting and updating usually help first.

mainEntity.name: Why is Siri taking so long to respond lately?

acceptedAnswer.text: If Siri is slow, the issue is often not just Siri but the device, network, or workload. Weak internet, low battery, background apps, or outdated software can all make Siri feel delayed. A restart and an iOS update are usually the quickest first checks.
acceptedAnswer.description: Slow Siri is often caused by network issues, outdated software, or device load. Restarting and updating usually help first.
